references.title: Collaborative Learning Group Formation with Density Clustering
references.journal: International Journal of Grid and Distributed Computing

annotations.text: The paper proposes a density-based algorithm for group formation. The algorithm starts with random assignment to cluster centers and iteratively adjusts centroids. (this seems awfully similar to k-means lol). The authors also argue against the general goal in group formation: maximize intra-group homogeneity and inter-group heterogeneity.
